beat.title: Through The Root
beat.boundaryReason: The session opens with setup and recap, then follows the party through the bone-like root tunnel, out into the Feywild, and along the first stretch of road as they take in the landscape, debate Holda's honesty, and decide to continue toward the manor; the next beat begins when Txarro's passive perception leads to the first body on the road.
dateEvidence: session.yaml gives drStart and drEnd as 1740-10-05.
u0053-u0067 recap the before-dawn descent and reopen in the root tunnel.
u0198-u0202 establish the party emerges just after sunset in the Feywild.
u0314-u0336 continue the same evening as the party leaves the ruined house and studies the road toward the manor.

sourceLines.text: I forgot to send you stuff in advance, but how about some, some, like, low-key ominous music?
sourceLines.raw: [u0001 | 00:00:00.000-00:00:04.710 | DM] I forgot to send you stuff in advance, but how about some, some, like, low-key ominous music?

sourceLines.text: Cool, let me, hold on, let me just do this really quickly to make sure I can do this, so…
sourceLines.raw: [u0002 | 00:00:05.370-00:00:10.610 | Kaito Min] Cool, let me, hold on, let me just do this really quickly to make sure I can do this, so…

sourceLines.text: I do share, I do… Advanced… I do computer audio, I hit share… And now…
sourceLines.raw: [u0003 | 00:00:10.840-00:00:22.230 | Kaito Min] I do share, I do… Advanced… I do computer audio, I hit share… And now…

sourceLines.text: If I open up Spotify, hopefully this will work.
sourceLines.raw: [u0004 | 00:00:22.880-00:00:25.220 | Kaito Min] If I open up Spotify, hopefully this will work.

sourceLines.text: This will be smoother in the future, y'all, sorry.
sourceLines.raw: [u0005 | 00:00:26.860-00:00:29.540 | Kaito Min] This will be smoother in the future, y'all, sorry.

sourceLines.text: And let me… just for fun…
sourceLines.raw: [u0006 | 00:00:31.460-00:00:36.830 | Kaito Min] And let me… just for fun…

sourceLines.text: Let's just see if you guys are getting… Hold on.
sourceLines.raw: [u0007 | 00:00:37.600-00:00:40.310 | Kaito Min] Let's just see if you guys are getting… Hold on.

sourceLines.text: Is there any music happening? There's not, right?
sourceLines.raw: [u0008 | 00:00:42.320-00:00:46.909 | Kaito Min] Is there any music happening? There's not, right?

sourceLines.text: There we go.
Now we got it.
Great.
Alright.
Ready?
Yeah. Yeah.
The five of you who have been adventuring and traveling together for the better part of this last year.
sourceLines.raw: [u0015 | 00:01:04.569-00:01:09.659 | DM] The five of you who have been adventuring and traveling together for the better part of this last year.

sourceLines.text: have been hired by a minor lord named Holda, the second son of.
sourceLines.raw: [u0016 | 00:01:10.359-00:01:17.099 | DM] have been hired by a minor lord named Holda, the second son of.

sourceLines.text: A no-name lord from southern Sembara.
sourceLines.raw: [u0017 | 00:01:17.810-00:01:19.940 | DM] A no-name lord from southern Sembara.

sourceLines.text: Who spent the last 25 years or more as an adventurer and sellsword, always trying to find and make his fortune, and never quite succeeding in it.
sourceLines.raw: [u0018 | 00:01:20.610-00:01:29.650 | DM] Who spent the last 25 years or more as an adventurer and sellsword, always trying to find and make his fortune, and never quite succeeding in it.

sourceLines.text: Last spring, after killing a dragon that had come down from the north.
sourceLines.raw: [u0019 | 00:01:30.940-00:01:35.750 | DM] Last spring, after killing a dragon that had come down from the north.

sourceLines.text: And losing his entire party in the process, and discovering…
sourceLines.raw: [u0020 | 00:01:35.950-00:01:40.040 | DM] And losing his entire party in the process, and discovering…

sourceLines.text: Since it was a wandering dragon, there was no hoard.
sourceLines.raw: [u0021 | 00:01:40.190-00:01:43.480 | DM] Since it was a wandering dragon, there was no hoard.

sourceLines.text: That he had nothing more in his purse than he did 3 decades ago when he left home. He was drinking his misery away when a long-lived elf approached him and gave him the deed to a…
sourceLines.raw: [u0022 | 00:01:43.640-00:01:56.720 | DM] That he had nothing more in his purse than he did 3 decades ago when he left home. He was drinking his misery away when a long-lived elf approached him and gave him the deed to a…

sourceLines.text: House.
in the wilderness.
In the far north of Sembara, or northwest of Tollen.
sourceLines.raw: [u0025 | 00:02:01.180-00:02:05.129 | DM] In the far north of Sembara, or northwest of Tollen.

sourceLines.text: No place that was long, long since swallowed by woods.
sourceLines.raw: [u0026 | 00:02:05.240-00:02:08.990 | DM] No place that was long, long since swallowed by woods.

sourceLines.text: You were hired by Alden, a small, stout, pale human.
sourceLines.raw: [u0027 | 00:02:09.570-00:02:13.030 | DM] You were hired by Alden, a small, stout, pale human.

sourceLines.text: With a curiosity about you all, and a profound fear of fire, apparently.
sourceLines.raw: [u0028 | 00:02:13.080-00:02:18.670 | DM] With a curiosity about you all, and a profound fear of fire, apparently.

sourceLines.text: to go there.
As you journey there over the course of several days, first going upriver and then crossing through the forest.
sourceLines.raw: [u0030 | 00:02:21.670-00:02:27.270 | DM] As you journey there over the course of several days, first going upriver and then crossing through the forest.

sourceLines.text: Which got denser, older, wilder, and less inhabited the further you went into it.
sourceLines.raw: [u0031 | 00:02:27.270-00:02:33.650 | DM] Which got denser, older, wilder, and less inhabited the further you went into it.

sourceLines.text: You at last came to Dandelion House, a marvel of late Drankorian architecture, at least 700 years old.
sourceLines.raw: [u0032 | 00:02:34.460-00:02:44.340 | DM] You at last came to Dandelion House, a marvel of late Drankorian architecture, at least 700 years old.

sourceLines.text: And the funny combination of both glorious and decrepit.
sourceLines.raw: [u0033 | 00:02:44.390-00:02:48.070 | DM] And the funny combination of both glorious and decrepit.

sourceLines.text: Parts of it…
The windows and the wooden window frames were decayed away into powder.
sourceLines.raw: [u0035 | 00:02:49.600-00:02:54.410 | DM] The windows and the wooden window frames were decayed away into powder.

sourceLines.text: As was much of the furniture inside, but not all of it.
sourceLines.raw: [u0036 | 00:02:54.440-00:02:59.129 | DM] As was much of the furniture inside, but not all of it.

sourceLines.text: There must be some sort of preservation magic woven through the structure.
sourceLines.raw: [u0037 | 00:02:59.460-00:03:03.749 | DM] There must be some sort of preservation magic woven through the structure.

sourceLines.text: Despite the misgivings of various party members, You meet… met Lord Holda.
sourceLines.raw: [u0038 | 00:03:04.790-00:03:13.539 | DM] Despite the misgivings of various party members, You meet… met Lord Holda.

sourceLines.text: who was… What, proud, bitter? Resentful?
sourceLines.raw: [u0039 | 00:03:14.180-00:03:20.350 | DM] who was… What, proud, bitter? Resentful?

sourceLines.text: Over the hill? Not in a cliched sort of way, but with the sense of the best days being behind already, and it wasn't that great anyways.
sourceLines.raw: [u0040 | 00:03:24.640-00:03:34.110 | DM] Over the hill? Not in a cliched sort of way, but with the sense of the best days being behind already, and it wasn't that great anyways.

sourceLines.text: Stuck on a wheel, always turning, one year after the next, always different, but always the same.
sourceLines.raw: [u0041 | 00:03:34.930-00:03:40.919 | DM] Stuck on a wheel, always turning, one year after the next, always different, but always the same.

sourceLines.text: He tells you the story of this elven archivist.
sourceLines.raw: [u0042 | 00:03:41.180-00:03:44.119 | DM] He tells you the story of this elven archivist.

sourceLines.text: who… Self, who called himself an archivist.
sourceLines.raw: [u0043 | 00:03:44.120-00:03:47.460 | DM] who… Self, who called himself an archivist.

sourceLines.text: Who gave him a deed to the house, to its… the house, its lands, and all the treasures therein.
sourceLines.raw: [u0044 | 00:03:47.730-00:03:53.570 | DM] Who gave him a deed to the house, to its… the house, its lands, and all the treasures therein.

sourceLines.text: on the condition.
That Holda asked you to step through a door in the floor and convince a man beyond to end a long-held treaty.
sourceLines.raw: [u0046 | 00:03:55.610-00:04:02.419 | DM] That Holda asked you to step through a door in the floor and convince a man beyond to end a long-held treaty.

sourceLines.text: Holda, whose only negotiation strategy, in fact, maybe his only strategy for moving through the world, period, seems to be intimidation, failed immediately to convince the man on the other side of this door of anything, and turned to the party for help.
sourceLines.raw: [u0047 | 00:04:04.040-00:04:18.619 | DM] Holda, whose only negotiation strategy, in fact, maybe his only strategy for moving through the world, period, seems to be intimidation, failed immediately to convince the man on the other side of this door of anything, and turned to the party for help.

sourceLines.text: Tarek, reading the document, knew that something didn't fit, but Kaito, by this point, had gone from deep.
sourceLines.raw: [u0048 | 00:04:20.420-00:04:26.329 | DM] Tarek, reading the document, knew that something didn't fit, but Kaito, by this point, had gone from deep.

sourceLines.text: Fear bordering on paranoia to.
sourceLines.raw: [u0049 | 00:04:26.640-00:04:29.959 | DM] Fear bordering on paranoia to.

sourceLines.text: Excitement bordering on rapturous enthusiasm.
sourceLines.raw: [u0050 | 00:04:30.180-00:04:33.050 | DM] Excitement bordering on rapturous enthusiasm.

sourceLines.text: Correct. And, The…

Ayveen, correct me if I'm saying any of the names wrong. Ayveen, observes that ending an unknown treaty may not, in fact, be a wise course of action to take, and Txarro points out that the treasure could equally well be a trap or metaphor. Nonetheless.
sourceLines.raw: [u0052 | 00:04:39.290-00:04:54.910 | DM] Ayveen, correct me if I'm saying any of the names wrong. Ayveen, observes that ending an unknown treaty may not, in fact, be a wise course of action to take, and Txarro points out that the treasure could equally well be a trap or metaphor. Nonetheless.

sourceLines.text: The party arises before dawn, woken by the grandfather clock, still in fine condition.
sourceLines.raw: [u0053 | 00:04:55.040-00:05:02.079 | DM] The party arises before dawn, woken by the grandfather clock, still in fine condition.

sourceLines.text: And Alden collects you from your rooms, leads you down through the ground floor, down through a massive basement, and down further still, opening a locked door with a glowing gold key, down through a passage hewn from living rock into a root-covered subcellar
sourceLines.raw: [u0054 | 00:05:02.170-00:05:19.709 | DM] And Alden collects you from your rooms, leads you down through the ground floor, down through a massive basement, and down further still, opening a locked door with a glowing gold key, down through a passage hewn from living rock into a root-covered subcellar

sourceLines.text: That surely predates the entire manor above it, and in fact.
sourceLines.raw: [u0055 | 00:05:20.180-00:05:24.710 | DM] That surely predates the entire manor above it, and in fact.

sourceLines.text: On reflection, subcellar isn't even quite the right thing, you…
sourceLines.raw: [u0056 | 00:05:24.910-00:05:28.510 | DM] On reflection, subcellar isn't even quite the right thing, you…

sourceLines.text: Assumed at the moment that's probably what it was, given its position below the cellar.
sourceLines.raw: [u0057 | 00:05:28.760-00:05:33.249 | DM] Assumed at the moment that's probably what it was, given its position below the cellar.

sourceLines.text: But there was nothing in it but these walls covered entirely in massive, hollowed-out, massive roots, rather.
sourceLines.raw: [u0058 | 00:05:34.230-00:05:41.230 | DM] But there was nothing in it but these walls covered entirely in massive, hollowed-out, massive roots, rather.

sourceLines.text: Holda is waiting there, and opens a door through this massive hollowed-out root.
sourceLines.raw: [u0059 | 00:05:41.400-00:05:46.210 | DM] Holda is waiting there, and opens a door through this massive hollowed-out root.

sourceLines.text: Promising to keep an eye on this end while you go through and take care of business on the far.
sourceLines.raw: [u0060 | 00:05:46.260-00:05:50.570 | DM] Promising to keep an eye on this end while you go through and take care of business on the far.

sourceLines.text: Once you get to the far side, he says, go up and up, and out and onto the road, and you'll see the manor just a little ways ahead, and seek there the master of the house.
sourceLines.raw: [u0061 | 00:05:51.570-00:06:01.099 | DM] Once you get to the far side, he says, go up and up, and out and onto the road, and you'll see the manor just a little ways ahead, and seek there the master of the house.

sourceLines.text: Just as he closes the door behind you.
sourceLines.raw: [u0062 | 00:06:02.620-00:06:04.770 | DM] Just as he closes the door behind you.

sourceLines.text: Tarek realizes the unsettling thing about the contract is that it was 400 years old, but written in contemporary Sembaran.
sourceLines.raw: [u0063 | 00:06:05.880-00:06:13.370 | DM] Tarek realizes the unsettling thing about the contract is that it was 400 years old, but written in contemporary Sembaran.

sourceLines.text: Considering, setting up…
Sort of a note of… Confusion.
sourceLines.raw: [u0065 | 00:06:15.330-00:06:19.270 | DM] Sort of a note of… Confusion.

sourceLines.text: We open in this moment, illuminated by a couple of light spells, I think.
sourceLines.raw: [u0066 | 00:06:21.370-00:06:28.210 | DM] We open in this moment, illuminated by a couple of light spells, I think.

sourceLines.text: As the five of you are crawling single file through this tunnel, barely bigger, barely bigger than you.
sourceLines.raw: [u0067 | 00:06:28.640-00:06:38.000 | DM] As the five of you are crawling single file through this tunnel, barely bigger, barely bigger than you.

sourceLines.text: Making your way towards who knows what.
sourceLines.raw: [u0068 | 00:06:39.220-00:06:42.780 | DM] Making your way towards who knows what.

sourceLines.text: Had we crawled far along, or can I do, like, a reaction to the door shutting?
sourceLines.raw: [u0069 | 00:06:45.270-00:06:49.480 | Ayveen] Had we crawled far along, or can I do, like, a reaction to the door shutting?

sourceLines.text: No, it's probably 50 feet behind you by this point.
sourceLines.raw: [u0070 | 00:06:50.020-00:06:52.909 | DM] No, it's probably 50 feet behind you by this point.

sourceLines.text: And there's not… there's not a way to turn around. Like, theoretically, you could crawl… Straight backwards.
sourceLines.raw: [u0071 | 00:06:53.060-00:06:59.780 | DM] And there's not… there's not a way to turn around. Like, theoretically, you could crawl… Straight backwards.

sourceLines.text: But it's not like you can switch your order or turn around.
sourceLines.raw: [u0072 | 00:07:03.940-00:07:06.589 | DM] But it's not like you can switch your order or turn around.

sourceLines.text: what I was really thinking is…
sourceLines.raw: [u0073 | 00:07:07.730-00:07:09.689 | DM] what I was really thinking is…

sourceLines.text: Just out of curiosity to see if I got a response to… see if message…
sourceLines.raw: [u0074 | 00:07:10.950-00:07:16.460 | DM] Just out of curiosity to see if I got a response to… see if message…

sourceLines.text: Sends through whatever the door is made of.
sourceLines.raw: [u0075 | 00:07:16.600-00:07:19.620 | DM] Sends through whatever the door is made of.

sourceLines.text: And, you know, I'd address Lord Holda and say.
sourceLines.raw: [u0076 | 00:07:20.260-00:07:24.740 | DM] And, you know, I'd address Lord Holda and say.

sourceLines.text: Please open the door.
sourceLines.raw: [u0077 | 00:07:25.080-00:07:26.389 | Ayveen] Please open the door.

sourceLines.text: You could…
Who responds?
message, if you'd like to.
That sounds like a great thing to try.
sourceLines.raw: [u0081 | 00:07:38.230-00:07:39.380 | Kaito Min] That sounds like a great thing to try.

sourceLines.text: That sounds like a great thing to try.
sourceLines.raw: [u0082 | 00:07:40.170-00:07:41.630 | Edric] That sounds like a great thing to try.

sourceLines.text: If he hears your message, he makes no response.
sourceLines.raw: [u0083 | 00:07:51.120-00:07:54.209 | DM] If he hears your message, he makes no response.

sourceLines.text: But I don't think there's a way to know if the spell.
sourceLines.raw: [u0084 | 00:07:55.160-00:07:58.339 | DM] But I don't think there's a way to know if the spell.

sourceLines.text: failed.
Yeah. Hmm.
It was only if he, like, cackled maniacally and said, that I know.
sourceLines.raw: [u0087 | 00:08:02.260-00:08:08.800 | Ayveen] It was only if he, like, cackled maniacally and said, that I know.

sourceLines.text: And Tarek says.
Any of you guys seen a…
Tree that would be big enough to have a root like this.
sourceLines.raw: [u0090 | 00:08:13.920-00:08:17.069 | Tarek] Tree that would be big enough to have a root like this.

sourceLines.text: You mean in real life?
sourceLines.raw: [u0091 | 00:08:20.650-00:08:22.110 | Edric] You mean in real life?

sourceLines.text: I mean, other than right now?
sourceLines.raw: [u0092 | 00:08:23.930-00:08:25.539 | Edric] I mean, other than right now?

sourceLines.text: Yeah, yeah.
Guys, so, of all the things that we know.
sourceLines.raw: [u0094 | 00:08:29.760-00:08:34.509 | Kaito Min] Guys, so, of all the things that we know.

sourceLines.text: What do we believe about any of the things that we think we know?
sourceLines.raw: [u0095 | 00:08:35.900-00:08:40.019 | Kaito Min] What do we believe about any of the things that we think we know?

sourceLines.text: So…
Did we… sorry, I… I was trying to remember, just sorry, before we answer that in-game, did… did we…
sourceLines.raw: [u0097 | 00:08:42.519-00:08:48.479 | DM] Did we… sorry, I… I was trying to remember, just sorry, before we answer that in-game, did… did we…

sourceLines.text: I couldn't remember if we had gotten any information at all about what the treaty is.
sourceLines.raw: [u0098 | 00:08:49.309-00:08:53.729 | Edric] I couldn't remember if we had gotten any information at all about what the treaty is.

sourceLines.text: vout or between. Was it, like… Total silence.
sourceLines.raw: [u0099 | 00:08:55.340-00:08:58.680 | Edric] vout or between. Was it, like… Total silence.

sourceLines.text: No, but I don't think he knew either. Like, he…
sourceLines.raw: [u0100 | 00:08:59.360-00:09:03.620 | DM] No, but I don't think he knew either. Like, he…

sourceLines.text: Totally.
He gave the impression that he went through and, like, immediately fucked up any sort of conversation in the first place.
sourceLines.raw: [u0102 | 00:09:04.340-00:09:10.879 | DM] He gave the impression that he went through and, like, immediately fucked up any sort of conversation in the first place.

sourceLines.text: And didn't even get to that point.
sourceLines.raw: [u0103 | 00:09:11.010-00:09:14.769 | DM] And didn't even get to that point.

sourceLines.text: Maybe we should replace it with a ceasefire.
sourceLines.raw: [u0104 | 00:09:18.210-00:09:20.939 | Tarek] Maybe we should replace it with a ceasefire.

sourceLines.text: Current events joke. Anyway, so what do we know about any… I think we know… Whatever happens…
sourceLines.raw: [u0105 | 00:09:23.280-00:09:31.770 | Tarek] Current events joke. Anyway, so what do we know about any… I think we know… Whatever happens…

sourceLines.text: We're gonna… Get something out of this.
sourceLines.raw: [u0106 | 00:09:32.510-00:09:35.610 | Tarek] We're gonna… Get something out of this.

sourceLines.text: And get out of here.
I mean…
That document is pretty strange.
sourceLines.raw: [u0109 | 00:09:42.390-00:09:44.520 | Tarek] That document is pretty strange.

sourceLines.text: Yeah, I guess, like, I'm not one to apologize often, but, sorry.
sourceLines.raw: [u0110 | 00:09:45.530-00:09:53.960 | Kaito Min] Yeah, I guess, like, I'm not one to apologize often, but, sorry.

sourceLines.text: Everyone for being a little erratic, a little up and down,
sourceLines.raw: [u0111 | 00:09:54.090-00:09:59.410 | Kaito Min] Everyone for being a little erratic, a little up and down,

sourceLines.text: Yeah, I guess I'm feeling a little, like,
sourceLines.raw: [u0112 | 00:10:00.600-00:10:04.880 | Kaito Min] Yeah, I guess I'm feeling a little, like,

sourceLines.text: I… well, just in this moment, I know we probably should continue this conversation later after we get out of this root, but I kind of don't know what to believe anymore, right? Like, what's the… who's… who's saying what? Like, you know, it's like, for all we know, that dude is, like…
sourceLines.raw: [u0113 | 00:10:05.490-00:10:20.769 | Kaito Min] I… well, just in this moment, I know we probably should continue this conversation later after we get out of this root, but I kind of don't know what to believe anymore, right? Like, what's the… who's… who's saying what? Like, you know, it's like, for all we know, that dude is, like…

sourceLines.text: Well, I mean, I don't know, like, literally nothing that he's… I mean, what are the things that we actually know are real? Like, does anybody believe… Did we… did we metagame? Does anybody have, like, you know, you're telling the truth things? I kind of do, right? Like, I remember I did a thing, and I asked… I was like, then he…
sourceLines.raw: [u0114 | 00:10:20.980-00:10:36.370 | Kaito Min] Well, I mean, I don't know, like, literally nothing that he's… I mean, what are the things that we actually know are real? Like, does anybody believe… Did we… did we metagame? Does anybody have, like, you know, you're telling the truth things? I kind of do, right? Like, I remember I did a thing, and I asked… I was like, then he…

sourceLines.text: Detect Thoughts.
Boom.
And he was… he was… he was, like, shorts, there was nothing unusual about him.
sourceLines.raw: [u0117 | 00:10:38.850-00:10:45.390 | Kaito Min] And he was… he was… he was, like, shorts, there was nothing unusual about him.

sourceLines.text: Right?
You detected thoughts on Alden.
sourceLines.raw: [u0119 | 00:10:46.960-00:10:49.930 | DM] You detected thoughts on Alden.

sourceLines.text: Yeah.
Oh, yeah…
but not on Holda.
Oh no, that's dumb.
Okay.
My bad.
We probably shouldn't have come here, but, like, now what choice do we have?
sourceLines.raw: [u0126 | 00:11:04.790-00:11:09.089 | Edric] We probably shouldn't have come here, but, like, now what choice do we have?

sourceLines.text: Yeah, well, sure, we're in it.
sourceLines.raw: [u0127 | 00:11:09.520-00:11:11.520 | Kaito Min] Yeah, well, sure, we're in it.

sourceLines.text: It'll work out.
Yeah, but also, like, you know, do we believe that there's a treaty? Do we believe that there… I mean, what do we… what do we even believe now about anything that we've been told?
sourceLines.raw: [u0129 | 00:11:13.110-00:11:21.769 | Kaito Min] Yeah, but also, like, you know, do we believe that there's a treaty? Do we believe that there… I mean, what do we… what do we even believe now about anything that we've been told?

sourceLines.text: You know what I say? Sometimes, you gotta go to the root of things.
sourceLines.raw: [u0130 | 00:11:21.770-00:11:25.309 | Tarek] You know what I say? Sometimes, you gotta go to the root of things.

sourceLines.text: I'm screwing up.
To figure out what's really…
sourceLines.raw: [u0132 | 00:11:28.060-00:11:29.440 | Tarek] To figure out what's really…

sourceLines.text: Perfect response to your, to your root joke.
sourceLines.raw: [u0133 | 00:11:29.440-00:11:32.280 | Edric] Perfect response to your, to your root joke.

sourceLines.text: And…
Even if you weren't trying to make a joke.
sourceLines.raw: [u0135 | 00:11:33.020-00:11:35.049 | Edric] Even if you weren't trying to make a joke.

sourceLines.text: Well, y'all, I guess we just keep going and see what happens.
sourceLines.raw: [u0136 | 00:11:36.560-00:11:40.270 | Kaito Min] Well, y'all, I guess we just keep going and see what happens.

sourceLines.text: as you make the root pun, and I assume have continued sort of inching your way along this tunnel as you've been talking, you realize that the texture of the thing you're crawling through has changed slightly, and it's less woody or fibrous and more…
sourceLines.raw: [u0137 | 00:11:41.900-00:11:58.350 | DM] as you make the root pun, and I assume have continued sort of inching your way along this tunnel as you've been talking, you realize that the texture of the thing you're crawling through has changed slightly, and it's less woody or fibrous and more…

sourceLines.text: almost, like, coral-like. Harder, but smooth, with…

beat.title: Bodies On The Road
beat.boundaryReason: Txarro's passive perception reveals the first mutilated body on the road; the party investigates the corpse, tracks, belongings, and further bodies before the next beat starts with their reaction to the danger and decision to seek divine and scouting help before approaching.

beat.boundaryReason: After the bodies sour the party's confidence, Kaito turns to Edric's faith, Txarro casts Augury, and the group scouts the manor and party with an owl before deciding how to approach; the next beat begins as they come up to the gate and the guards notice them.
dateEvidence: session.yaml gives drStart and drEnd as 1740-10-05.
u0711-u0728 continue the evening approach along the hedgerow.
u0740-u0753 give the Augury result in the same twilight approach.

sourceLines.raw: [u0961 | 01:11:13.310-01:11:16.409 | DM] You know, let's just, let's just feel it out and see.

sourceLines.text: You know, don't think there's anything here that's gonna kill us right away.
sourceLines.raw: [u0962 | 01:11:16.770-01:11:19.580 | Kaito Min] You know, don't think there's anything here that's gonna kill us right away.

sourceLines.text: What do you guys think?
The owl overhead.

beat.title: Well Met, Mortals
beat.boundaryReason: The party reaches the open gate, glimpses the masked lord through the owl, questions the doglike road guards about the bodies, the Twilight Kingdom, and the party, then pays entry with stories of dreams; the next beat begins when the guards let them through into the grounds.
dateEvidence: session.yaml gives drStart and drEnd as 1740-10-05.
u0965-u1004 show the party arriving at the gate in the same evening.
u1052-u1061 confirm they remain in the unmoving twilight of the Twilight Kingdom.

sourceLines.text: As you're coming up to the gate, the last thing that you see through the owl's eyes, just before the guards,
sourceLines.raw: [u0965 | 01:11:28.660-01:11:36.840 | DM] As you're coming up to the gate, the last thing that you see through the owl's eyes, just before the guards,

sourceLines.text: Notice you, and sort of.
stand and…
Rub their eyes and, raise a hand to hail you.
sourceLines.raw: [u0968 | 01:11:39.920-01:11:43.239 | DM] Rub their eyes and, raise a hand to hail you.

sourceLines.text: In one of the doors of the manor.
sourceLines.raw: [u0969 | 01:11:45.730-01:11:47.780 | DM] In one of the doors of the manor.

sourceLines.text: Illuminated brightly from behind.
sourceLines.raw: [u0970 | 01:11:48.510-01:11:52.490 | DM] Illuminated brightly from behind.

sourceLines.text: a tall… Man? Stans?
stepping…
With a sort of a lithe grace like a dancer into the doorway.
sourceLines.raw: [u0973 | 01:11:59.050-01:12:03.230 | DM] With a sort of a lithe grace like a dancer into the doorway.

sourceLines.text: With the backlighting, it's difficult to tell…
sourceLines.raw: [u0974 | 01:12:05.040-01:12:08.610 | DM] With the backlighting, it's difficult to tell…

sourceLines.text: if the…
Smoothness of his face is his face itself, or like a sort of a mask, like a masquerade kind of mask that he's been.
sourceLines.raw: [u0976 | 01:12:11.210-01:12:20.120 | DM] Smoothness of his face is his face itself, or like a sort of a mask, like a masquerade kind of mask that he's been.

sourceLines.text: put.
bond.
But you…
You see him scan over the crowd.
sourceLines.raw: [u0980 | 01:12:24.400-01:12:27.669 | DM] You see him scan over the crowd.

sourceLines.text: You see his eyes fall away down the slope of the hills, to where the…
sourceLines.raw: [u0981 | 01:12:28.080-01:12:33.400 | DM] You see his eyes fall away down the slope of the hills, to where the…

sourceLines.text: People are climbing into the rowboat to head onwards.
sourceLines.raw: [u0982 | 01:12:33.680-01:12:37.349 | DM] People are climbing into the rowboat to head onwards.

sourceLines.text: You see him note sharp voices raised among a small, cluster of people off and away below the, below the patios. And then you see him look directly at the owl and make eye contact
sourceLines.raw: [u0983 | 01:12:37.540-01:12:52.969 | DM] You see him note sharp voices raised among a small, cluster of people off and away below the, below the patios. And then you see him look directly at the owl and make eye contact

sourceLines.text: Nod to himself, and step back inside the house.
sourceLines.raw: [u0984 | 01:12:54.000-01:12:57.390 | DM] Nod to himself, and step back inside the house.

sourceLines.text: The guards raise a hand in greeting.
sourceLines.raw: [u0985 | 01:13:01.110-01:13:02.930 | DM] The guards raise a hand in greeting.

sourceLines.text: But then a look of confusion comes over their face. They're two deeply, deeply wrinkled, sort of elderly men.
sourceLines.raw: [u0986 | 01:13:04.470-01:13:13.729 | DM] But then a look of confusion comes over their face. They're two deeply, deeply wrinkled, sort of elderly men.

sourceLines.text: pot-bellied…
With, you know, the sort of hoods that someone wears that's just, like, the separate hood from the cloak
sourceLines.raw: [u0988 | 01:13:16.030-01:13:22.399 | DM] With, you know, the sort of hoods that someone wears that's just, like, the separate hood from the cloak

sourceLines.text: And they… they look at you.
With a note of confusion, and then…
sourceLines.raw: [u0990 | 01:13:27.070-01:13:28.840 | DM] With a note of confusion, and then…

sourceLines.text: And then lift their noses to sniff, and sniff almost dog-like, and in their sniffing,
sourceLines.raw: [u0991 | 01:13:28.840-01:13:36.420 | DM] And then lift their noses to sniff, and sniff almost dog-like, and in their sniffing,

sourceLines.text: There's a strange moment of not understanding if you're seeing.
sourceLines.raw: [u0992 | 01:13:38.140-01:13:41.270 | DM] There's a strange moment of not understanding if you're seeing.

sourceLines.text: Men pretending to be dogs, or dogs pretending to be men.
sourceLines.raw: [u0993 | 01:13:41.270-01:13:46.150 | DM] Men pretending to be dogs, or dogs pretending to be men.

sourceLines.text: But they finished that, and then.
sourceLines.raw: [u0994 | 01:13:46.680-01:13:49.489 | DM] But they finished that, and then.

sourceLines.text: Nod a greeting, and say… Well met and welcome, mortals.
sourceLines.raw: [u0995 | 01:13:50.260-01:13:55.109 | DM] Nod a greeting, and say… Well met and welcome, mortals.

sourceLines.text: What?
Word dope.
Well met and welcome.
Mortals.
Kaito gives a flourish of his cape, What?
sourceLines.raw: [u1000 | 01:14:03.490-01:14:08.560 | Kaito Min] Kaito gives a flourish of his cape, What?

sourceLines.text: Language do they say this in?
sourceLines.raw: [u1001 | 01:14:08.560-01:14:10.010 | Txarro] Language do they say this in?

sourceLines.text: Common.
Heavily accented Common.
sourceLines.raw: [u1003 | 01:14:14.570-01:14:16.190 | DM] Heavily accented Common.

sourceLines.text: Accented Common?
sourceLines.raw: [u1004 | 01:14:16.840-01:14:17.779 | Kaito Min] Accented Common?

sourceLines.text: ambiguously.
Goodbye.
Yeah.
Kaito gives a flourish. Greetings.
sourceLines.raw: [u1008 | 01:14:27.530-01:14:30.240 | DM] Kaito gives a flourish. Greetings.

sourceLines.text: But before he walks in, though, he's, he glances and says, The festivities ending soon?
sourceLines.raw: [u1009 | 01:14:31.890-01:14:38.390 | Kaito Min] But before he walks in, though, he's, he glances and says, The festivities ending soon?

sourceLines.text: Indeed.
Indeed.
The party is ending.
You're just in time.
The party before it ends, says one, with a chuckle.
sourceLines.raw: [u1015 | 01:14:52.190-01:14:55.640 | DM] The party before it ends, says one, with a chuckle.

sourceLines.text: Indeed.
My favorite time.
Yeah, he gets ahold of that.
sourceLines.raw: [u1018 | 01:14:59.810-01:15:01.470 | DM] Yeah, he gets ahold of that.

sourceLines.text: Where have you… come from?
It's unusual.
To see so many of you together at once at this time of night.
sourceLines.raw: [u1021 | 01:15:09.910-01:15:12.929 | DM] To see so many of you together at once at this time of night.

sourceLines.text: Damn.
Do we use Detect Thoughts now?
sourceLines.raw: [u1023 | 01:15:17.250-01:15:19.009 | Kaito Min] Do we use Detect Thoughts now?

sourceLines.text: Find out in a minute.
No. Not now.
Where did we come from?
Down the road, of course.
The one who hasn't said anything so far chuckles, like you've made a very incisive joke.
sourceLines.raw: [u1028 | 01:15:32.270-01:15:38.900 | DM] The one who hasn't said anything so far chuckles, like you've made a very incisive joke.

sourceLines.text: And may I ask, can you share more about the party?
sourceLines.raw: [u1029 | 01:15:43.660-01:15:46.430 | Kaito Min] And may I ask, can you share more about the party?

sourceLines.text: Well, our apologies for being late.
sourceLines.raw: [u1030 | 01:15:47.290-01:15:48.569 | DM] Well, our apologies for being late.

sourceLines.text: Yeah, I…
I'll tell you this.
We belong to the road.
to the party.
The party isn't our story. We know what we hear and smell and see through the gate, but this is as far as we go.
sourceLines.raw: [u1035 | 01:16:00.090-01:16:08.979 | DM] The party isn't our story. We know what we hear and smell and see through the gate, but this is as far as we go.

sourceLines.text: Well… Perhaps some candor.
sourceLines.raw: [u1036 | 01:16:10.650-01:16:12.990 | DM] Well… Perhaps some candor.

sourceLines.text: We came from the road. We saw bodies.
sourceLines.raw: [u1037 | 01:16:13.870-01:16:18.230 | DM] We came from the road. We saw bodies.

sourceLines.text: Presumably coming from here.
sourceLines.raw: [u1038 | 01:16:19.530-01:16:21.079 | Kaito Min] Presumably coming from here.

sourceLines.text: Maybe, maybe not.
I love a good party. Gives another flourish and a wink.
sourceLines.raw: [u1040 | 01:16:23.880-01:16:29.069 | DM] I love a good party. Gives another flourish and a wink.

sourceLines.text: But also, the bodies.
Anything you might be able to share about the party?
sourceLines.raw: [u1042 | 01:16:33.080-01:16:37.220 | DM] Anything you might be able to share about the party?

sourceLines.text: And the Lord here?
sourceLines.raw: [u1043 | 01:16:37.220-01:16:38.010 | Kaito Min] And the Lord here?

sourceLines.text: The ones you passed did not come from this house.
sourceLines.raw: [u1044 | 01:16:42.590-01:16:45.900 | DM] The ones you passed did not come from this house.

sourceLines.text: But further up the road.
Is there anything further up the road?
sourceLines.raw: [u1046 | 01:16:52.680-01:16:54.490 | Edric] Is there anything further up the road?

sourceLines.text: I mean, the road keeps going, right?
sourceLines.raw: [u1047 | 01:16:56.100-01:16:57.450 | Edric] I mean, the road keeps going, right?

sourceLines.text: Yep, yeah, the road absolutely keeps going.
sourceLines.raw: [u1048 | 01:16:59.200-01:17:02.430 | DM] Yep, yeah, the road absolutely keeps going.

sourceLines.text: The road… the road goes on and on and on.
sourceLines.raw: [u1049 | 01:17:05.580-01:17:11.310 | DM] The road… the road goes on and on and on.

sourceLines.text: I'm gonna have to pull up the right…
sourceLines.raw: [u1050 | 01:17:11.730-01:17:14.470 | DM] I'm gonna have to pull up the right…

sourceLines.text: Notes.
In the Twilight Kingdom, there are a dozen dozen houses, homes, and holes, with the setting sun just over the horizon.
sourceLines.raw: [u1052 | 01:17:23.480-01:17:31.189 | DM] In the Twilight Kingdom, there are a dozen dozen houses, homes, and holes, with the setting sun just over the horizon.

sourceLines.text: This is the Twilight Kingdom.
sourceLines.raw: [u1053 | 01:17:33.770-01:17:34.809 | Kaito Min] This is the Twilight Kingdom.

sourceLines.text: Which.
Which way is the road going?
sourceLines.raw: [u1055 | 01:17:41.510-01:17:43.059 | DM] Which way is the road going?

sourceLines.text: towards the sun?
Away from…
The road goes almost, as near as you can tell, the road goes parallel…
sourceLines.raw: [u1058 | 01:17:47.640-01:17:54.390 | DM] The road goes almost, as near as you can tell, the road goes parallel…

sourceLines.text: To what in any other place would be the north-south axis.
sourceLines.raw: [u1059 | 01:17:54.680-01:17:58.159 | DM] To what in any other place would be the north-south axis.

sourceLines.text: Exactly between day and night.
sourceLines.raw: [u1060 | 01:17:58.350-01:18:01.529 | DM] Exactly between day and night.

sourceLines.text: And you notice, in fact, having been here for at least an hour now, that the sun has not moved in the sky.
sourceLines.raw: [u1061 | 01:18:03.020-01:18:09.179 | DM] And you notice, in fact, having been here for at least an hour now, that the sun has not moved in the sky.

sourceLines.text: Do you have…
Sensing your confusion, the same guard says, do you have where you're from.
sourceLines.raw: [u1063 | 01:18:21.470-01:18:27.110 | DM] Sensing your confusion, the same guard says, do you have where you're from.

sourceLines.text: Disease that spreads from one… person to another.
sourceLines.raw: [u1064 | 01:18:28.970-01:18:32.910 | DM] Disease that spreads from one… person to another.

sourceLines.text: Yes.
Well, we don't have that here.
sourceLines.raw: [u1066 | 01:18:37.910-01:18:39.559 | DM] Well, we don't have that here.

sourceLines.text: But we have something…
Similar, something, mmm…
Sometimes people get infected in a way…
sourceLines.raw: [u1069 | 01:18:50.260-01:18:53.040 | DM] Sometimes people get infected in a way…

sourceLines.text: Sometimes people get caught by a bad smell.
sourceLines.raw: [u1070 | 01:18:54.010-01:18:57.219 | DM] Sometimes people get caught by a bad smell.

sourceLines.text: And that smell… Can cause disaster and spread to more people with the bad smell.
sourceLines.raw: [u1071 | 01:18:58.450-01:19:06.200 | DM] And that smell… Can cause disaster and spread to more people with the bad smell.

sourceLines.text: We belong to the road.
We keep the road safe.
Sometimes, the people with the bad smell
sourceLines.raw: [u1074 | 01:19:15.360-01:19:18.229 | DM] Sometimes, the people with the bad smell

sourceLines.text: You can't get the bad smell out of them any other way.
sourceLines.raw: [u1075 | 01:19:18.450-01:19:21.859 | DM] You can't get the bad smell out of them any other way.

sourceLines.text: I think that's what you saw.
sourceLines.raw: [u1076 | 01:19:23.730-01:19:25.059 | DM] I think that's what you saw.

sourceLines.text: They only have spears, they don't have any bows or anything like that.
sourceLines.raw: [u1077 | 01:19:32.500-01:19:35.439 | Edric] They only have spears, they don't have any bows or anything like that.

sourceLines.text: Though their feet are shod in plain, soft boots.
sourceLines.raw: [u1078 | 01:19:39.930-01:19:44.440 | DM] Though their feet are shod in plain, soft boots.

sourceLines.text: So… The bodies… you guys don't have anything to do with the bodies.
sourceLines.raw: [u1079 | 01:19:47.750-01:19:52.499 | Kaito Min] So… The bodies… you guys don't have anything to do with the bodies.

sourceLines.text: My people do, some of us stay at the gate, some of us travel the road.
sourceLines.raw: [u1080 | 01:19:56.940-01:20:01.639 | DM] My people do, some of us stay at the gate, some of us travel the road.

sourceLines.text: But you don't know what to do with the bodies.
sourceLines.raw: [u1081 | 01:20:02.460-01:20:04.130 | Kaito Min] But you don't know what to do with the bodies.

sourceLines.text: The two of us? No. No, no.
Our place is the gate.
Right. And, and again, the Lord of the manor here?
sourceLines.raw: [u1084 | 01:20:09.900-01:20:14.400 | Kaito Min] Right. And, and again, the Lord of the manor here?

sourceLines.text: What do you know of him?
sourceLines.raw: [u1085 | 01:20:16.510-01:20:17.500 | Kaito Min] What do you know of him?

sourceLines.text: He came to the gate once.
He came to the gate once.
Just at the height of the party, Just before… You know what it's like?
sourceLines.raw: [u1088 | 01:20:39.100-01:20:46.419 | DM] Just at the height of the party, Just before… You know what it's like?

sourceLines.text: When a gathering starts to come apart, you can feel it before anyone's even left. He came in that moment.
sourceLines.raw: [u1089 | 01:20:46.760-01:20:54.380 | DM] When a gathering starts to come apart, you can feel it before anyone's even left. He came in that moment.

sourceLines.text: To tell us to…
Be careful.
Careful of travelers on the road.
sourceLines.raw: [u1092 | 01:21:03.040-01:21:04.739 | DM] Careful of travelers on the road.

sourceLines.text: To smell very carefully for the bad smell.
sourceLines.raw: [u1093 | 01:21:05.590-01:21:08.090 | DM] To smell very carefully for the bad smell.

sourceLines.text: But to let in any mortal who wanted entrance.
sourceLines.raw: [u1094 | 01:21:09.160-01:21:12.829 | DM] But to let in any mortal who wanted entrance.

sourceLines.text: It was a strange thing, I remember it, too.
sourceLines.raw: [u1095 | 01:21:14.160-01:21:16.779 | DM] It was a strange thing, I remember it, too.

sourceLines.text: I would have thought he just said any guest who wanted entrance, but he said any mortal who wants entrance, send them in.
sourceLines.raw: [u1096 | 01:21:17.130-01:21:23.880 | DM] I would have thought he just said any guest who wanted entrance, but he said any mortal who wants entrance, send them in.

sourceLines.text: Excellent.
When was this directive?
sourceLines.raw: [u1098 | 01:21:30.230-01:21:32.060 | Kaito Min] When was this directive?

sourceLines.text: Just, just, just as the party began to end. Just after the height of it.
sourceLines.raw: [u1099 | 01:21:34.780-01:21:41.339 | DM] Just, just, just as the party began to end. Just after the height of it.

sourceLines.text: We arrived, of course, when it was just beginning.
sourceLines.raw: [u1100 | 01:21:41.870-01:21:44.029 | DM] We arrived, of course, when it was just beginning.

sourceLines.text: Oh, so very… quite recently. How long has this party been going?
sourceLines.raw: [u1101 | 01:21:44.980-01:21:47.260 | Kaito Min] Oh, so very… quite recently. How long has this party been going?

sourceLines.text: He shakes his head, confused.
sourceLines.raw: [u1102 | 01:21:51.310-01:21:53.250 | DM] He shakes his head, confused.

sourceLines.text: Like you're asking a sort of a ridiculous question.
sourceLines.raw: [u1103 | 01:21:54.310-01:21:59.249 | DM] Like you're asking a sort of a ridiculous question.

sourceLines.text: began and reached its peak, and now it's coming apart.
sourceLines.raw: [u1104 | 01:22:00.790-01:22:04.690 | DM] began and reached its peak, and now it's coming apart.

sourceLines.text: Yeah, yeah, yeah, no, I understand.
sourceLines.raw: [u1105 | 01:22:05.010-01:22:06.910 | Kaito Min] Yeah, yeah, yeah, no, I understand.

sourceLines.text: You mentioned, the other…
Lord's down the road.
sourceLines.raw: [u1107 | 01:22:11.480-01:22:12.779 | Kaito Min] Lord's down the road.

sourceLines.text: Pensions?
Wait, say that again?
Tensions?
Of… sorry.
Well, you just said the bodies, they're not from here, they're not from this house, the bodies are from another house.
sourceLines.raw: [u1112 | 01:22:20.930-01:22:25.060 | Kaito Min] Well, you just said the bodies, they're not from here, they're not from this house, the bodies are from another house.

sourceLines.text: Do you know what house they're from?
sourceLines.raw: [u1113 | 01:22:25.160-01:22:26.870 | DM] Do you know what house they're from?

sourceLines.text: There's a house…
That when people come out of, they come out of it with the bad smell sometimes.
sourceLines.raw: [u1115 | 01:22:31.100-01:22:35.579 | DM] That when people come out of, they come out of it with the bad smell sometimes.

sourceLines.text: What?
What does that smell like?
sourceLines.raw: [u1117 | 01:22:37.260-01:22:38.319 | Edric] What does that smell like?

sourceLines.text: Just…
So we can avoid it.
He looks thoughtful and deep for a sec, and then locks in eye contact with you and says.
sourceLines.raw: [u1120 | 01:22:48.430-01:22:54.909 | DM] He looks thoughtful and deep for a sec, and then locks in eye contact with you and says.

sourceLines.text: It smells exactly unlike anything else I have ever smelled in my entire living.
sourceLines.raw: [u1121 | 01:22:55.920-01:23:01.500 | DM] It smells exactly unlike anything else I have ever smelled in my entire living.

sourceLines.text: It's the opposite of smell.
sourceLines.raw: [u1122 | 01:23:04.670-01:23:06.469 | DM] It's the opposite of smell.

sourceLines.text: what's confused.
Thank you.
gives a nod.
Are there other mortals with this party?
sourceLines.raw: [u1126 | 01:23:22.760-01:23:24.939 | Txarro] Are there other mortals with this party?

sourceLines.text: There's a handful, a few have come by boat.
sourceLines.raw: [u1127 | 01:23:26.680-01:23:31.029 | DM] There's a handful, a few have come by boat.

sourceLines.text: The halflings came soon after it began.
sourceLines.raw: [u1128 | 01:23:33.280-01:23:36.070 | DM] The halflings came soon after it began.

sourceLines.text: They always seem to.
Thanks.
I think there was a dwarf… he turns to the other one, the dwarf went in, did they come out?
sourceLines.raw: [u1131 | 01:23:40.220-01:23:44.409 | DM] I think there was a dwarf… he turns to the other one, the dwarf went in, did they come out?

sourceLines.text: And a few I couldn't quite tell. None of them had the bad smell, though.
sourceLines.raw: [u1132 | 01:23:48.640-01:23:52.000 | DM] And a few I couldn't quite tell. None of them had the bad smell, though.

sourceLines.text: Did one…
Come and go.
I…
Any number of them have come and gone.
sourceLines.raw: [u1136 | 01:24:04.650-01:24:06.179 | DM] Any number of them have come and gone.

sourceLines.text: Since the party began to end?
sourceLines.raw: [u1137 | 01:24:09.940-01:24:11.599 | Edric] Since the party began to end?

sourceLines.text: He looks thoughtful for a moment, as though just sort of,
sourceLines.raw: [u1138 | 01:24:14.840-01:24:18.099 | DM] He looks thoughtful for a moment, as though just sort of,

sourceLines.text: Trying to put that together for the first time.
sourceLines.raw: [u1139 | 01:24:18.100-01:24:20.420 | DM] Trying to put that together for the first time.

sourceLines.text: Let's see…
Yeah… they… Yes. They've been going more than coming lately, I suppose.
sourceLines.raw: [u1141 | 01:24:30.530-01:24:37.930 | DM] Yeah… they… Yes. They've been going more than coming lately, I suppose.

sourceLines.text: That is what ending means, right?
sourceLines.raw: [u1142 | 01:24:39.540-01:24:41.040 | Edric] That is what ending means, right?

sourceLines.text: Would you like to go in?
The house down at the end of the road, the one that's kind of fallen apart.
sourceLines.raw: [u1144 | 01:24:54.710-01:24:57.700 | Edric] The house down at the end of the road, the one that's kind of fallen apart.

sourceLines.text: Heat.
Says in a language you don't recognize what surely must be some curse and spits.
sourceLines.raw: [u1146 | 01:25:03.130-01:25:07.799 | DM] Says in a language you don't recognize what surely must be some curse and spits.

sourceLines.text: It's a bad-smelling place. We don't go there.
sourceLines.raw: [u1147 | 01:25:10.770-01:25:12.749 | DM] It's a bad-smelling place. We don't go there.

sourceLines.text: Does the road end in the other direction, too?
sourceLines.raw: [u1148 | 01:25:15.470-01:25:17.740 | Txarro] Does the road end in the other direction, too?

sourceLines.text: Roads don't end.
They only ever go… On and on.
sourceLines.raw: [u1150 | 01:25:25.530-01:25:29.149 | DM] They only ever go… On and on.

sourceLines.text: No, some roads don't…
Edric, like, covers up his mouth, like, I probably should get in an argument with them and stop talking.
sourceLines.raw: [u1152 | 01:25:35.780-01:25:40.300 | Edric] Edric, like, covers up his mouth, like, I probably should get in an argument with them and stop talking.

sourceLines.text: We belong to the road, he says. We know.
sourceLines.raw: [u1153 | 01:25:41.100-01:25:43.800 | DM] We belong to the road, he says. We know.

sourceLines.text: Should we go in?
Txarro says to everybody else, in… Tollish, not Common.
sourceLines.raw: [u1155 | 01:25:48.870-01:25:56.290 | Txarro] Txarro says to everybody else, in… Tollish, not Common.

sourceLines.text: Which I presume everybody understands.
sourceLines.raw: [u1156 | 01:25:59.020-01:26:01.340 | Txarro] Which I presume everybody understands.

sourceLines.text: Let's do it.

sourceLines.text: And it just goes on and on like that.

sourceLines.text: And… I'll never have another one.
sourceLines.raw: [u1353 | 01:39:25.070-01:39:28.240 | Kaito Min] And… I'll never have another one.

sourceLines.text: But… The one was pretty good.
sourceLines.raw: [u1354 | 01:39:28.890-01:39:32.900 | Kaito Min] But… The one was pretty good.

sourceLines.text: And I like that I can go back and visit parts of it.
sourceLines.raw: [u1355 | 01:39:33.830-01:39:36.149 | Kaito Min] And I like that I can go back and visit parts of it.

sourceLines.text: I suspect sometimes that the lord of this house, too.
sourceLines.raw: [u1356 | 01:39:43.300-01:39:46.639 | DM] I suspect sometimes that the lord of this house, too.

sourceLines.text: Lives always with a sense of having lost something that won't come back again.
sourceLines.raw: [u1357 | 01:39:51.710-01:39:56.370 | DM] Lives always with a sense of having lost something that won't come back again.

sourceLines.text: Not just that won't come back again, that can't ever come back again.
sourceLines.raw: [u1358 | 01:39:56.650-01:40:00.490 | DM] Not just that won't come back again, that can't ever come back again.

sourceLines.text: Wait, say that last part again?
sourceLines.raw: [u1359 | 01:40:02.090-01:40:03.309 | Kaito Min] Wait, say that last part again?

sourceLines.text: That the Lord of this house.
sourceLines.raw: [u1360 | 01:40:04.670-01:40:06.500 | DM] That the Lord of this house.

sourceLines.text: Lives having lost something like you that he cannot ever recover once again.
sourceLines.raw: [u1361 | 01:40:07.080-01:40:12.599 | DM] Lives having lost something like you that he cannot ever recover once again.

sourceLines.text: Mmm…
But I don't hear you describing it as… loss, or… grief, I hear…
sourceLines.raw: [u1363 | 01:40:14.320-01:40:22.479 | DM] But I don't hear you describing it as… loss, or… grief, I hear…

sourceLines.text: Acceptance of that change?
sourceLines.raw: [u1364 | 01:40:26.550-01:40:28.300 | DM] Acceptance of that change?

sourceLines.text: Totally.
No regrets, no remorse. Onwards.
sourceLines.raw: [u1366 | 01:40:34.620-01:40:37.220 | Kaito Min] No regrets, no remorse. Onwards.

sourceLines.text: It is what it is.
Kit, I don't want to cut you off if you've got one lined up, but I'm also happy to move us in.
sourceLines.raw: [u1368 | 01:40:45.710-01:40:49.759 | DM] Kit, I don't want to cut you off if you've got one lined up, but I'm also happy to move us in.

sourceLines.text: But alright.
I would… if, if we…
Got flummoxed by the Elves Don't Dream. I had something to say to…
sourceLines.raw: [u1371 | 01:40:53.800-01:40:57.170 | Ayveen] Got flummoxed by the Elves Don't Dream. I had something to say to…

sourceLines.text: You know, full.
third one, so we need it as needed, but I'm fine.
sourceLines.raw: [u1373 | 01:40:58.120-01:41:02.260 | Ayveen] third one, so we need it as needed, but I'm fine.

sourceLines.text: They gesture for you to step through the gate.
sourceLines.raw: [u1374 | 01:41:03.790-01:41:07.970 | DM] They gesture for you to step through the gate.

beat.title: The Ending Party
beat.boundaryReason: The party enters the grounds, feels the looped not-quite-frozen ending of the celebration, tests that they can leave, and splits into small social approaches while Kaito tries to engage the exhausted musicians; the next beat starts with Txarro and others speaking to the halflings.
dateEvidence: session.yaml gives drStart and drEnd as 1740-10-05.
u1378-u1399 describe the same evening party already ending.
u1403-u1437 clarify the party's repeated ending moment rather than a new day.

sourceLines.text: Stop.
flipping through.
You see the long… actually, Tim, will you put on the next, background for us?
sourceLines.raw: [u1377 | 01:41:13.820-01:41:18.329 | DM] You see the long… actually, Tim, will you put on the next, background for us?

sourceLines.text: You see the long, sloping lawn that leads from the river's edge up to the patios and open doors of a bright and handsome house.
sourceLines.raw: [u1378 | 01:41:18.890-01:41:28.020 | DM] You see the long, sloping lawn that leads from the river's edge up to the patios and open doors of a bright and handsome house.

sourceLines.text: You see string lights strung in globes going down the hill as the ground falls away ahead of you.
sourceLines.raw: [u1379 | 01:41:28.390-01:41:36.429 | DM] You see string lights strung in globes going down the hill as the ground falls away ahead of you.

sourceLines.text: You see, groups 1s and twos and 4s and fives.
sourceLines.raw: [u1380 | 01:41:38.040-01:41:42.489 | DM] You see, groups 1s and twos and 4s and fives.

sourceLines.text: You see the signs of a party ending?
sourceLines.raw: [u1381 | 01:41:46.420-01:41:50.110 | DM] You see the signs of a party ending?

sourceLines.text: The lighting is strange in the house, uneven. Some rooms brightly lit, and some less so.
sourceLines.raw: [u1382 | 01:41:51.220-01:41:57.649 | DM] The lighting is strange in the house, uneven. Some rooms brightly lit, and some less so.

sourceLines.text: You see that…
On a second glance, many of the lanterns have already gone out, and in others, the candles are flickering low. You see…
sourceLines.raw: [u1384 | 01:42:00.810-01:42:09.909 | DM] On a second glance, many of the lanterns have already gone out, and in others, the candles are flickering low. You see…

sourceLines.text: Hmm…
Empty glasses left in strange places, like the side of the pathway here, where a plate and wine goblet have been set.
sourceLines.raw: [u1386 | 01:42:11.300-01:42:21.469 | DM] Empty glasses left in strange places, like the side of the pathway here, where a plate and wine goblet have been set.

sourceLines.text: Long after you've left this place behind.
sourceLines.raw: [u1387 | 01:42:24.650-01:42:28.050 | DM] Long after you've left this place behind.

sourceLines.text: Long after all of the details of it have faded from your head.
sourceLines.raw: [u1388 | 01:42:28.870-01:42:32.929 | DM] Long after all of the details of it have faded from your head.

sourceLines.text: And the colors that are so vivid in this moment are drained away.
sourceLines.raw: [u1389 | 01:42:33.550-01:42:39.090 | DM] And the colors that are so vivid in this moment are drained away.

sourceLines.text: Long after you've forgotten the accents of the speakers, or even the language that they spoke to you in, and the music that the players play returns to you only in your dreams.
sourceLines.raw: [u1390 | 01:42:40.180-01:42:52.010 | DM] Long after you've forgotten the accents of the speakers, or even the language that they spoke to you in, and the music that the players play returns to you only in your dreams.

sourceLines.text: You remember… The feeling of the coolness in the air, like the first smell of winter in late October.
sourceLines.raw: [u1391 | 01:42:55.340-01:43:03.840 | DM] You remember… The feeling of the coolness in the air, like the first smell of winter in late October.

sourceLines.text: Like, the moment… When you're still dancing with her and you know she's left you already.
sourceLines.raw: [u1392 | 01:43:04.220-01:43:11.169 | DM] Like, the moment… When you're still dancing with her and you know she's left you already.

sourceLines.text: And when evening falls… And you can't distinguish whether the shape in the distance
sourceLines.raw: [u1393 | 01:43:12.390-01:43:18.699 | DM] And when evening falls… And you can't distinguish whether the shape in the distance

sourceLines.text: Is a man at rest, or a corpse on the ground?
sourceLines.raw: [u1394 | 01:43:18.870-01:43:22.299 | DM] Is a man at rest, or a corpse on the ground?

sourceLines.text: It's not, in those days, A memory of this place that returns to you, then.
sourceLines.raw: [u1395 | 01:43:22.540-01:43:28.829 | DM] It's not, in those days, A memory of this place that returns to you, then.

sourceLines.text: But a kind of knowing, deeper than words and deeper than thought, that the day has already slipped between your fingers. That you've already lost it.
sourceLines.raw: [u1396 | 01:43:29.080-01:43:37.429 | DM] But a kind of knowing, deeper than words and deeper than thought, that the day has already slipped between your fingers. That you've already lost it.

sourceLines.text: That the party is already ending by the time you've arrived at it.
sourceLines.raw: [u1397 | 01:43:37.590-01:43:41.780 | DM] That the party is already ending by the time you've arrived at it.

sourceLines.text: Never to return.
An evening has come.
Sorry, what's never to return?

sourceLines.text: The celebration, the day… Everything that's passed.
sourceLines.raw: [u1401 | 01:43:50.820-01:43:56.199 | DM] The celebration, the day… Everything that's passed.

sourceLines.text: is finally… Passed.

sourceLines.text: Great.

You see two people climbing into a rowboat in the river, setting their oars in the oarlocks, getting ready to cast off.
sourceLines.raw: [u1411 | 01:44:58.460-01:45:05.200 | DM] You see two people climbing into a rowboat in the river, setting their oars in the oarlocks, getting ready to cast off.

sourceLines.text: is that it is the same thing happening over and over again, but each time that you see it, it's like you're seeing it for the first time. And it takes a kind of conscious effort on your part.

it's not something new that… no, no, no, those… those are the same people. The boat has just turned 30 degrees, but it's the same boat, and the…

beat.title: The Old Halflings
beat.boundaryReason: Txarro, Kaito, and others question two drunken halflings, discover they are wildly out of time, learn they came from Chardon by rabbit and boat, and get their impressions of the Lord of the Manor before trying to lead them toward wine and other mortals; the next beat shifts to Ayveen and Edric finding the tiger-like guest.
dateEvidence: session.yaml gives drStart and drEnd as 1740-10-05.

sourceLines.text: Oh my god, this is, like, the most serious guy you have ever met. He's so… he's so… and then… but there's all this stuff…
sourceLines.raw: [u1859 | 02:15:18.260-02:15:31.489 | DM] Oh my god, this is, like, the most serious guy you have ever met. He's so… he's so… and then… but there's all this stuff…

sourceLines.text: And he's, like, sad about that, too, and you're like, oh, no! But… but also, I mean, he's like, so you don't feel too…

sourceLines.text: You know, like, you want to give him a hug, but you should NOT give him a hug, because he's not the sort of person you give a hug to.
sourceLines.raw: [u1861 | 02:15:39.570-02:15:48.479 | DM] You know, like, you want to give him a hug, but you should NOT give him a hug, because he's not the sort of person you give a hug to.

sourceLines.raw: [u1862 | 02:15:48.660-02:15:52.870 | DM] I think if there's one thing you take away… Just not… the hugs.

sourceLines.text: Ugh.
Yeah?
Does that, does that answer your question?
sourceLines.raw: [u1865 | 02:15:59.960-02:16:03.919 | DM] Does that, does that answer your question?

sourceLines.text: Come… come for a stroll with us.
sourceLines.raw: [u1866 | 02:16:07.370-02:16:09.480 | Txarro] Come… come for a stroll with us.

sourceLines.text: Let's… let's find some wine and… and maybe clear your heads a bit.
sourceLines.raw: [u1867 | 02:16:09.790-02:16:15.440 | Txarro] Let's… let's find some wine and… and maybe clear your heads a bit.

sourceLines.text: He allows himself to be persuaded and helps his friend up, too.
sourceLines.raw: [u1868 | 02:16:16.730-02:16:21.500 | DM] He allows himself to be persuaded and helps his friend up, too.

sourceLines.text: Follow after you.
I think my… I mean, I'm happy to walk with them, but my main goal is to find… now I strongly suspect that…
sourceLines.raw: [u1870 | 02:16:23.990-02:16:30.549 | Txarro] I think my… I mean, I'm happy to walk with them, but my main goal is to find… now I strongly suspect that…

sourceLines.raw: [u1871 | 02:16:32.090-02:16:37.149 | Txarro] everybody here has been here for far longer than they think. I want to find another…

sourceLines.text: Human or mortal of some kind, probably not an elf.
sourceLines.raw: [u1872 | 02:16:37.860-02:16:42.710 | DM] Human or mortal of some kind, probably not an elf.

Have Edric and I run into anyone on our way to a fine wine?
sourceLines.raw: [u1874 | 02:16:47.559-02:16:50.639 | Ayveen] Have Edric and I run into anyone on our way to a fine wine?

beat.title: The Tiger's Story
beat.boundaryReason: Ayveen and Edric find the sober tiger-like guest, negotiate for his knowledge with Tarek's keys, and hear his account of Lord Revel, the naming contest, and the transformation into Lord Endless Ending; the next beat begins when Ayveen turns the story toward the immediate question of leaving and the truce.
dateEvidence: session.yaml gives drStart and drEnd as 1740-10-05.
u1875-u1917 keep the scene inside the same ending party.
u2061-u2163 narrate the tiger guest's backstory while the current party scene continues.

sourceLines.text: Yes, you see two… Obvious… mortals.
sourceLines.raw: [u1875 | 02:16:53.030-02:16:59.620 | DM] Yes, you see two… Obvious… mortals.

sourceLines.text: One of whom is in the library, napping behind a couch, in the space between the couch and the wall.
sourceLines.raw: [u1876 | 02:17:00.260-02:17:09.030 | DM] One of whom is in the library, napping behind a couch, in the space between the couch and the wall.

sourceLines.text: Possibly sleeping it off?

sourceLines.text: one corner. You can see through an open archway .

sourceLines.text: But it's a, something like a…

sourceLines.text: Tiger man? Like, with the massive head of a Bengal tiger.
sourceLines.raw: [u1885 | 02:17:54.009-02:17:59.169 | DM] Tiger man? Like, with the massive head of a Bengal tiger.

sourceLines.raw: [u1886 | 02:17:59.319-02:18:05.719 | DM] But the body… I mean, the fur-covered, powerful body of a man.

sourceLines.text: Paws and a tail wearing…

sourceLines.raw: [u1889 | 02:18:12.089-02:18:15.999 | DM] Silk pants and, smoking a pipe.

sourceLines.text: If all of the other guests are, in a way.

sourceLines.text: Stuck in their own loops, or like…

sourceLines.text: Maybe he is fey, but you get the impression that it's… No.

sourceLines.text: where is he compared to the bar? Is he, like, in the same room as them?

sourceLines.text: So you've come through the house, like, through a big entry ballroom, and then through the library where you saw the sky, and then in this other room, sort of on the back side of the house, that is set up with the bar on one side, and very picked-over food tables on the other.
sourceLines.raw: [u1901 | 02:19:13.969-02:19:28.809 | DM] So you've come through the house, like, through a big entry ballroom, and then through the library where you saw the sky, and then in this other room, sort of on the back side of the house, that is set up with the bar on one side, and very picked-over food tables on the other.

sourceLines.text: And there's a big double doors in that room that opens out onto yet another patio on the far side of the house.
sourceLines.raw: [u1902 | 02:19:28.809-02:19:34.019 | DM] And there's a big double doors in that room that opens out onto yet another patio on the far side of the house.

sourceLines.text: And he's sitting in a chair out there. And he notices you walking into the room with the bar.
sourceLines.raw: [u1903 | 02:19:34.019-02:19:41.779 | DM] And he's sitting in a chair out there. And he notices you walking into the room with the bar.

sourceLines.text: And gives a little, head nod to you, in recognition.
sourceLines.raw: [u1904 | 02:19:42.019-02:19:45.959 | DM] And gives a little, head nod to you, in recognition.

Not awkwardly, but I'm mostly focused on finding a bottle of wine for the halflings.
sourceLines.raw: [u1906 | 02:19:49.950-02:19:53.980 | Edric] Not awkwardly, but I'm mostly focused on finding a bottle of wine for the halflings.

sourceLines.raw: [u1908 | 02:19:59.150-02:20:01.780 | DM] You know, the whole room and the whole house, in fact.

sourceLines.text: It's just everywhere you look, there are signs of this party ending. The tone of voice, even when you don't hear the words that people are speaking in, is just a little… little sharper, a little less patient.
sourceLines.raw: [u1909 | 02:20:02.280-02:20:12.949 | DM] It's just everywhere you look, there are signs of this party ending. The tone of voice, even when you don't hear the words that people are speaking in, is just a little… little sharper, a little less patient.

sourceLines.raw: [u1910 | 02:20:15.590-02:20:22.059 | DM] None of the windows are open the same amount, you know, because different people have opened them over the course of the night, and…

sourceLines.raw: [u1912 | 02:20:39.530-02:20:53.270 | DM] wine glasses and cutlery are sort of everywhere and anywhere, and the remains of the buffet have probably sat out a little too long for people to be eating them, and all the good things have been picked over. This is just, like, broccoli left.

the bar is unstaffed.

sourceLines.text: Yeah, sure.
There's nothing still sealed, but there's one bottle that's, like, a solid 3 quarters of the way full.

sourceLines.text: Edric, let's take a detour with that.

the… Halflings will still be grateful for it if we… if we delay a bit.

sourceLines.raw: [u1921 | 02:21:23.900-02:21:26.720 | Ayveen] I'd like to… Meet this other guest.

sourceLines.text: Sure.
Oh, man.
walk into the room where he is, and I say, I hope you don't mind our…

sourceLines.text: Intruding in the quiet of this space.
sourceLines.raw: [u1925 | 02:21:47.600-02:21:49.950 | Ayveen] Intruding in the quiet of this space.

sourceLines.text: Sorry, this is the, tigerman smoking his pipe on the porch? Yeah, yeah.

sourceLines.text: in a deep voice that is half a purr and…

sourceLines.text: half, gravelly gravel. He says, not at all, not at all. And he gestures with his pipe to bring chairs. There's no one else out in this space.
sourceLines.raw: [u1928 | 02:22:04.740-02:22:14.799 | DM] half, gravelly gravel. He says, not at all, not at all. And he gestures with his pipe to bring chairs. There's no one else out in this space.

sourceLines.text: Please.
Sit?
Tell me your stories.
Have you had a chance to collect the stories of many of the guests at this gathering?
sourceLines.raw: [u1932 | 02:22:33.050-02:22:37.049 | Ayveen] Have you had a chance to collect the stories of many of the guests at this gathering?

sourceLines.text: Mmm.
I have, but,
I'll tell you a secret.
Because the two of you are also going to die.
sourceLines.raw: [u1936 | 02:22:48.050-02:22:50.490 | DM] Because the two of you are also going to die.

sourceLines.text: The thing that's the most interesting to me
sourceLines.raw: [u1937 | 02:22:51.720-02:22:54.479 | DM] The thing that's the most interesting to me

sourceLines.text: Isn't the stories of the guest, but the stories of our host.
sourceLines.raw: [u1938 | 02:22:54.850-02:22:59.089 | DM] Isn't the stories of the guest, but the stories of our host.

sourceLines.text: And by speaking to the guests, I've pieced together why this party is ending.
sourceLines.raw: [u1939 | 02:22:59.690-02:23:05.159 | DM] And by speaking to the guests, I've pieced together why this party is ending.

sourceLines.text: And he smiles a very broad, and… Extremely toothy grin. This is… Not like a… human-sized…
sourceLines.raw: [u1940 | 02:23:07.860-02:23:20.130 | DM] And he smiles a very broad, and… Extremely toothy grin. This is… Not like a… human-sized…

sourceLines.text: Tiger head, but a… massive. He's…
sourceLines.raw: [u1941 | 02:23:20.430-02:23:23.970 | DM] Tiger head, but a… massive. He's…

sourceLines.raw: [u1942 | 02:23:24.610-02:23:28.659 | DM] Seated, but probably 8 feet tall if he were to stand up.

sourceLines.text: Sounds like a very satisfactory mystery to have pieced together.
sourceLines.raw: [u1943 | 02:23:31.370-02:23:35.670 | Ayveen] Sounds like a very satisfactory mystery to have pieced together.

sourceLines.text: I will say, I feel a bit, smug.
sourceLines.raw: [u1944 | 02:23:37.310-02:23:40.529 | DM] I will say, I feel a bit, smug.

sourceLines.text: I would not have all your hard work.
sourceLines.raw: [u1945 | 02:23:45.730-02:23:48.170 | Ayveen] I would not have all your hard work.

sourceLines.text: Wasted, but perhaps you could… Give some hints.
sourceLines.raw: [u1946 | 02:23:48.690-02:23:52.259 | Ayveen] Wasted, but perhaps you could… Give some hints.

sourceLines.text: Mmm.
So this delayed…
Will you trade me for it?
Whoa.
Not inclined to tell my stories.
sourceLines.raw: [u1951 | 02:24:02.080-02:24:05.219 | Ayveen] Not inclined to tell my stories.

sourceLines.text: When in a new place.
I'm not sure of… practices.
sourceLines.raw: [u1953 | 02:24:09.530-02:24:13.140 | Ayveen] I'm not sure of… practices.

sourceLines.text: Good.
We are… Traveling together, Edric and I, and we have some stories.
sourceLines.raw: [u1955 | 02:24:17.360-02:24:22.770 | Ayveen] We are… Traveling together, Edric and I, and we have some stories.

sourceLines.text: Where are you from?
We're from Tollen.
Do you have a home there?
I do.
Allow me to stay in your home for a month and a day the next time I'm in Tollen.
sourceLines.raw: [u1960 | 02:24:43.050-02:24:47.580 | DM] Allow me to stay in your home for a month and a day the next time I'm in Tollen.

sourceLines.text: Hmm.
Is there a significance of that timing among your people?
sourceLines.raw: [u1962 | 02:24:52.760-02:24:55.540 | Ayveen] Is there a significance of that timing among your people?

sourceLines.text: I've not met anyone like you before.
sourceLines.raw: [u1963 | 02:24:55.940-02:24:58.170 | Ayveen] I've not met anyone like you before.

sourceLines.text: were Southerners, mostly.
sourceLines.raw: [u1964 | 02:24:59.750-02:25:01.870 | DM] were Southerners, mostly.

sourceLines.text: No, it's mostly that I think I have about a month's worth of… Sights to see.
sourceLines.raw: [u1965 | 02:25:05.580-02:25:10.910 | DM] No, it's mostly that I think I have about a month's worth of… Sights to see.

sourceLines.text: It's a big city, after all.
Does it matter that I don't own the home?
sourceLines.raw: [u1967 | 02:25:18.410-02:25:20.339 | Ayveen] Does it matter that I don't own the home?

sourceLines.text: Do you have a room of your own, undisturbed?
sourceLines.raw: [u1968 | 02:25:28.530-02:25:32.079 | DM] Do you have a room of your own, undisturbed?

sourceLines.text: Yes.
Then I'll have that for a month and a day.
sourceLines.raw: [u1970 | 02:25:35.350-02:25:37.430 | DM] Then I'll have that for a month and a day.

sourceLines.text: Well, it's unlikely that my parents would object.
sourceLines.raw: [u1971 | 02:25:41.030-02:25:43.440 | Ayveen] Well, it's unlikely that my parents would object.

sourceLines.text: Very good.
He reaches out a paw, which is…
sourceLines.raw: [u1973 | 02:25:52.110-02:25:54.460 | DM] He reaches out a paw, which is…

sourceLines.text: I don't know, easily 4 or 5 times the size of your own hand to shake.
sourceLines.raw: [u1974 | 02:25:55.320-02:25:59.980 | DM] I don't know, easily 4 or 5 times the size of your own hand to shake.

sourceLines.text: Edric, can you.
Kind of looking at you like, are you sure you want to do this?
sourceLines.raw: [u1976 | 02:26:06.680-02:26:09.340 | Edric] Kind of looking at you like, are you sure you want to do this?

sourceLines.text: I don't. I'm looking at… I'm asking you a question to distract from shaking this creature's hand.
sourceLines.raw: [u1977 | 02:26:09.790-02:26:15.149 | Ayveen] I don't. I'm looking at… I'm asking you a question to distract from shaking this creature's hand.

sourceLines.text: Edric, have you met my parents?
sourceLines.raw: [u1978 | 02:26:15.290-02:26:17.220 | Ayveen] Edric, have you met my parents?

sourceLines.text: I… yes?
You would want me to ask their permission?
sourceLines.raw: [u1980 | 02:26:28.560-02:26:30.459 | Ayveen] You would want me to ask their permission?

sourceLines.text: Because I'm sorry, sir, I'm beginning to wonder if I ought to.
sourceLines.raw: [u1981 | 02:26:33.270-02:26:36.339 | Ayveen] Because I'm sorry, sir, I'm beginning to wonder if I ought to.

sourceLines.text: And they're not…
It would be easier if I arrived as a man.
sourceLines.raw: [u1983 | 02:26:37.390-02:26:40.919 | DM] It would be easier if I arrived as a man.

sourceLines.text: I would be happy to.
I mean, some of my best friends look…
sourceLines.raw: [u1985 | 02:26:47.460-02:26:49.430 | Ayveen] I mean, some of my best friends look…

sourceLines.text: Like, all manner of animals, and… well, not that's a wrong way of saying that, I've got to say that a different way.
sourceLines.raw: [u1986 | 02:26:50.620-02:26:57.339 | Ayveen] Like, all manner of animals, and… well, not that's a wrong way of saying that, I've got to say that a different way.

sourceLines.text: Not everybody knows theirs is a van.
sourceLines.raw: [u1987 | 02:27:00.620-02:27:02.850 | Ayveen] Not everybody knows theirs is a van.

sourceLines.text: He occupies himself with, or,
sourceLines.raw: [u1988 | 02:27:03.300-02:27:07.280 | DM] He occupies himself with, or,

sourceLines.text: Has the affectation, at least, of fiddling with his pipe and sprinkling him in fresh tobacco from a pouch on his belt.
sourceLines.raw: [u1989 | 02:27:08.170-02:27:14.889 | DM] Has the affectation, at least, of fiddling with his pipe and sprinkling him in fresh tobacco from a pouch on his belt.

sourceLines.text: Oh, that's very thoughtful of you, to cover my blunders.
sourceLines.raw: [u1990 | 02:27:15.800-02:27:19.259 | Ayveen] Oh, that's very thoughtful of you, to cover my blunders.

sourceLines.text: I don't think it would matter what you… I don't think it matters what you look like, sir.
sourceLines.raw: [u1991 | 02:27:25.030-02:27:28.830 | Ayveen] I don't think it would matter what you… I don't think it matters what you look like, sir.

sourceLines.text: Well, that's very open-minded of you.
sourceLines.raw: [u1992 | 02:27:30.490-02:27:32.420 | DM] Well, that's very open-minded of you.

sourceLines.text: Is there anything other than a stay in my parents' home, which I cannot grant, that I could offer you for a hint at your discovery?
sourceLines.raw: [u1993 | 02:27:36.140-02:27:44.320 | Ayveen] Is there anything other than a stay in my parents' home, which I cannot grant, that I could offer you for a hint at your discovery?

sourceLines.text: Do you have any keys on your person?
sourceLines.raw: [u1994 | 02:27:52.960-02:27:54.950 | DM] Do you have any keys on your person?

sourceLines.text: Don't have any keys.
But my friend could… probably has one. He tends to have interesting things in his pockets.
sourceLines.raw: [u1996 | 02:28:06.530-02:28:11.829 | Ayveen] But my friend could… probably has one. He tends to have interesting things in his pockets.

sourceLines.text: I haven't seen Tarek in a while.
sourceLines.raw: [u1997 | 02:28:13.780-02:28:15.169 | Ayveen] I haven't seen Tarek in a while.

sourceLines.text: Tarek has gotta have a key on him.

I came to the Twilight Kingdom. To the dozen dozen houses…
sourceLines.raw: [u2061 | 02:32:44.590-02:32:54.029 | DM] I came to the Twilight Kingdom. To the dozen dozen houses…

sourceLines.text: Because there are certain things you can only find in Twilight.

sourceLines.text: Things that have been lost and can't be found again?
sourceLines.raw: [u2063 | 02:33:01.450-02:33:06.049 | DM] Things that have been lost and can't be found again?

sourceLines.text: places that can never be returned to, and I…
sourceLines.raw: [u2064 | 02:33:07.000-02:33:11.860 | DM] places that can never be returned to, and I…

sourceLines.text: In my younger days, got obsessive about that sort of a time, that moment.
sourceLines.raw: [u2065 | 02:33:11.990-02:33:17.960 | DM] In my younger days, got obsessive about that sort of a time, that moment.

sourceLines.text: The moment all of the past has ended, but before the future's begun yet, the moment when things are beginning…
sourceLines.raw: [u2066 | 02:33:20.220-02:33:27.560 | DM] The moment all of the past has ended, but before the future's begun yet, the moment when things are beginning…

sourceLines.text: But haven't yet begun.
I got, you might say, obsessive over this, and decided…
sourceLines.raw: [u2068 | 02:33:31.470-02:33:35.829 | DM] I got, you might say, obsessive over this, and decided…

sourceLines.text: I would spend a day traveling the Twilight Kingdoms.
sourceLines.raw: [u2069 | 02:33:36.850-02:33:40.660 | DM] I would spend a day traveling the Twilight Kingdoms.

sourceLines.text: I pieced this together from the various guests.

sourceLines.text: Most of the ones who are here now
sourceLines.raw: [u2071 | 02:33:46.800-02:33:49.620 | DM] Most of the ones who are here now

sourceLines.raw: [u2072 | 02:33:50.150-02:33:53.860 | DM] Arrived at the party when it was just beginning.

sourceLines.text: This.

sourceLines.text: The height of the party.
The neighbors. The neighbors.

sourceLines.text: came to the lord of this house, whose name was Lord Revel.

And they wanted from him

sourceLines.text: sort of a bargain. They wanted an agreement. They wanted him to do something for them.

sourceLines.text: That any mortal who visited the party Sooner or later.
sourceLines.raw: [u2084 | 02:34:43.410-02:34:49.610 | DM] That any mortal who visited the party Sooner or later.

sourceLines.text: Would be sent through the front door of their house, just up the road.
sourceLines.raw: [u2085 | 02:34:49.750-02:34:54.869 | DM] Would be sent through the front door of their house, just up the road.

sourceLines.text: It's difficult to persuade a fey lord of anything at all.
sourceLines.raw: [u2086 | 02:34:59.170-02:35:04.470 | DM] It's difficult to persuade a fey lord of anything at all.

To persuade him to do harm to his guests.

sourceLines.text: Which surely breaks one of the most basic rules of the dozen dozen houses.

sourceLines.text: A bird that could speak every language?

sourceLines.text: A map of the stars that twilight had not yet revealed overhead.
