sourceLines.text: But for Lord Revel.
This was of no consequence. Every guest brings gifts to his party. Or, he says, chuckling, looking over you, or bribes the guards.
sourceLines.raw: [u2095 | 02:35:44.800-02:35:55.040 | DM] This was of no consequence. Every guest brings gifts to his party. Or, he says, chuckling, looking over you, or bribes the guards.

sourceLines.text: of does.

About the 10 days of celebration that followed the Emperor's coronation, and everything they saw there, performers, from the endless ocean and beyond it.

sourceLines.text: Far beyond the edge of the endless ocean. But none of these stories of Revel were of any value. Not to Lord Revel, who was himself Revelry.

sourceLines.text: And the dozen dozen houses of the Twilight Kingdom have celebrations for which there is no word in mortal tongue to describe them. So in desperation, drawing on some book of lore they must have found, they challenged him instead to a game, to a contest.
sourceLines.raw: [u2104 | 02:36:57.090-02:37:13.989 | DM] And the dozen dozen houses of the Twilight Kingdom have celebrations for which there is no word in mortal tongue to describe them. So in desperation, drawing on some book of lore they must have found, they challenged him instead to a game, to a contest.

sourceLines.text: A game of poetry. A game of naming.
sourceLines.raw: [u2105 | 02:37:14.150-02:37:17.519 | DM] A game of poetry. A game of naming.

sourceLines.text: Whoever could most beautifully name Lord Revel's estate.
sourceLines.raw: [u2106 | 02:37:18.920-02:37:24.720 | DM] Whoever could most beautifully name Lord Revel's estate.

sourceLines.text: Well, then they could ask one favor of the other.
sourceLines.raw: [u2107 | 02:37:26.260-02:37:29.570 | DM] Well, then they could ask one favor of the other.

sourceLines.text: Lord Revel went.
First.
And…
Spoke the name?
As it had been all evening long.
sourceLines.raw: [u2112 | 02:37:40.730-02:37:43.860 | DM] As it had been all evening long.

sourceLines.text: Wide lungs.
Spread down easy.
Hanging lanterns welcome you. A party begins, Lord Revel. Beginning.
sourceLines.raw: [u2115 | 02:37:49.600-02:37:55.860 | DM] Hanging lanterns welcome you. A party begins, Lord Revel. Beginning.

sourceLines.text: But this wizard… Guessed correctly.
sourceLines.raw: [u2116 | 02:37:59.190-02:38:03.210 | DM] But this wizard… Guessed correctly.

sourceLines.text: That Revel was trapped inside of his own story. Trapped, in fact, by his own immortality, trapped by the frozenness in time, unable to imagine that his story had any other moment, or could have any other moment in it except for the present.
sourceLines.raw: [u2117 | 02:38:04.110-02:38:23.910 | DM] That Revel was trapped inside of his own story. Trapped, in fact, by his own immortality, trapped by the frozenness in time, unable to imagine that his story had any other moment, or could have any other moment in it except for the present.

sourceLines.text: This wizard.
Guessed correctly that Revel could not imagine…
sourceLines.raw: [u2119 | 02:38:28.060-02:38:31.550 | DM] Guessed correctly that Revel could not imagine…

sourceLines.text: That the wine would spill and run out, that the guests would slowly drift away, and the players on the patio grow tired.
sourceLines.raw: [u2120 | 02:38:31.700-02:38:41.979 | DM] That the wine would spill and run out, that the guests would slowly drift away, and the players on the patio grow tired.

sourceLines.text: So the wizard did not speak the name.
sourceLines.raw: [u2121 | 02:38:43.800-02:38:47.029 | DM] So the wizard did not speak the name.

sourceLines.text: Of this house as it is.
He spoke the name of this house as it would become.
sourceLines.raw: [u2123 | 02:38:50.870-02:38:55.079 | DM] He spoke the name of this house as it would become.

sourceLines.text: Saying, Wide lawns gone askew.
sourceLines.raw: [u2124 | 02:38:55.550-02:39:00.830 | DM] Saying, Wide lawns gone askew.

sourceLines.text: Hanging lanterns flicker low. A party ending. Lord Endless Ending.
sourceLines.raw: [u2125 | 02:39:01.540-02:39:08.170 | DM] Hanging lanterns flicker low. A party ending. Lord Endless Ending.

sourceLines.text: And in that act of naming.
sourceLines.raw: [u2126 | 02:39:10.640-02:39:13.689 | DM] And in that act of naming.

sourceLines.text: With whatever power and lore this human had at his disposal in that act of naming.
sourceLines.raw: [u2127 | 02:39:15.760-02:39:22.809 | DM] With whatever power and lore this human had at his disposal in that act of naming.

sourceLines.text: The lord of the house looked up.
sourceLines.raw: [u2128 | 02:39:23.550-02:39:25.479 | DM] The lord of the house looked up.

sourceLines.text: And saw, indeed, it was so. Empty glasses sat on every surface.
sourceLines.raw: [u2129 | 02:39:26.090-02:39:31.250 | DM] And saw, indeed, it was so. Empty glasses sat on every surface.

sourceLines.text: Already the candles were burning out.
sourceLines.raw: [u2130 | 02:39:31.870-02:39:34.720 | DM] Already the candles were burning out.

sourceLines.text: And a small boat was already in the water, the rowers calling out farewell, and the chill of evening entered the air for the first time.
sourceLines.raw: [u2131 | 02:39:35.640-02:39:45.110 | DM] And a small boat was already in the water, the rowers calling out farewell, and the chill of evening entered the air for the first time.

sourceLines.text: And that is the moment it has been.
sourceLines.raw: [u2132 | 02:39:47.000-02:39:49.669 | DM] And that is the moment it has been.

sourceLines.text: Ever since.
From time to time, The grandfather clock chimes.
sourceLines.raw: [u2134 | 02:39:53.260-02:39:58.220 | DM] From time to time, The grandfather clock chimes.

sourceLines.text: And Lord.
Endlessly ending sends another mortal guest down the road, but whether that's been once…
sourceLines.raw: [u2136 | 02:39:59.990-02:40:06.690 | DM] Endlessly ending sends another mortal guest down the road, but whether that's been once…

sourceLines.text: Or a hundred times.
Who can say?
And at the edges of his vision, just beyond where he can see, Despair.
sourceLines.raw: [u2139 | 02:40:13.360-02:40:22.170 | DM] And at the edges of his vision, just beyond where he can see, Despair.

sourceLines.text: hovers around the Lord now, not of Revel Beginning, but of an endless ending.
sourceLines.raw: [u2140 | 02:40:22.170-02:40:28.660 | DM] hovers around the Lord now, not of Revel Beginning, but of an endless ending.

sourceLines.text: And soon he will be alone.
sourceLines.raw: [u2141 | 02:40:29.340-02:40:31.989 | DM] And soon he will be alone.

sourceLines.text: In an empty, messy house.
The best.
Well behind him.
That's our host.
And that's enough story.
For me, I had just… one more…
Bull to smoke.
And then I go on to the next of the kingdoms.
sourceLines.raw: [u2149 | 02:40:53.060-02:40:56.410 | DM] And then I go on to the next of the kingdoms.

sourceLines.text: The next of the houses, I should say.
sourceLines.raw: [u2150 | 02:40:56.940-02:40:58.990 | DM] The next of the houses, I should say.

sourceLines.text: And there, he falls, silent.
sourceLines.raw: [u2151 | 02:41:01.410-02:41:03.989 | DM] And there, he falls, silent.

sourceLines.text: Smiling, and you do hear a deep purr emerging from somewhere low, low in his throat. A self-satisfied sound.
sourceLines.raw: [u2152 | 02:41:04.180-02:41:14.710 | DM] Smiling, and you do hear a deep purr emerging from somewhere low, low in his throat. A self-satisfied sound.

sourceLines.text: Utterly independent.
How long have you been here?
sourceLines.raw: [u2154 | 02:41:28.830-02:41:30.209 | Txarro] How long have you been here?

sourceLines.text: What I'll say is I, like…
sourceLines.raw: [u2155 | 02:41:33.500-02:41:35.030 | Txarro] What I'll say is I, like…

sourceLines.text: Me and the halflings stumble up on the last, like, third of that story.
sourceLines.raw: [u2156 | 02:41:35.530-02:41:39.810 | Txarro] Me and the halflings stumble up on the last, like, third of that story.

sourceLines.text: In truth, I don't know.
But I knew that I wouldn't know.
sourceLines.raw: [u2158 | 02:41:51.100-02:41:53.249 | DM] But I knew that I wouldn't know.

sourceLines.text: When I came to this place.
sourceLines.raw: [u2159 | 02:41:53.600-02:41:55.829 | DM] When I came to this place.

sourceLines.text: I was born in the year of three eclipses.
sourceLines.raw: [u2160 | 02:42:00.190-02:42:03.590 | DM] I was born in the year of three eclipses.

sourceLines.text: But I don't know if that means anything to you.
sourceLines.raw: [u2161 | 02:42:04.530-02:42:06.919 | DM] But I don't know if that means anything to you.

sourceLines.text: Like I said, my home is far.
Far from Tollen, Human cities.
sourceLines.raw: [u2163 | 02:42:10.770-02:42:14.570 | DM] Far from Tollen, Human cities.

beat.title: The Truce Theory
beat.boundaryReason: The group connects the naming contest to Holda's mission, considers whether the Lord is bound by a truce he cannot break himself, learns another human may be moving through the house, and ends as Lord Endless Ending sends that human away and beckons Edric closer; the session closes on the party's working theory.
dateEvidence: session.yaml gives drStart and drEnd as 1740-10-05.
u2164-u2288 continue the same conversation with the tiger guest at the evening party.
u2313-u2331 mark the clock striking zero and the cliffhanger without evidence of a date change.

sourceLines.text: Does it matter to you to leave before the grandfather clock chimes again?
sourceLines.raw: [u2164 | 02:42:27.020-02:42:30.589 | Ayveen] Does it matter to you to leave before the grandfather clock chimes again?

sourceLines.text: That is the question.
I very much would not like to test my strength against the Lord, but there are… at least…
sourceLines.raw: [u2166 | 02:42:39.140-02:42:46.200 | DM] I very much would not like to test my strength against the Lord, but there are… at least…

sourceLines.text: 2, 3… Three others that I know of… Actually, no, 4…
sourceLines.raw: [u2167 | 02:42:46.720-02:42:54.140 | DM] 2, 3… Three others that I know of… Actually, no, 4…

sourceLines.raw: [u2168 | 02:42:54.270-02:42:56.829 | DM] 4 others that I know of. There's a…

sourceLines.raw: [u2169 | 02:42:57.290-02:43:00.690 | DM] There's a human around here somewhere, not sleeping it off.

sourceLines.text: So I have some time… yeah.
The guards don't mind if we leave by the road.
sourceLines.raw: [u2171 | 02:43:16.280-02:43:18.900 | Ayveen] The guards don't mind if we leave by the road.

sourceLines.text: Indeed, they do not.
I fear it.
they're not… Here to guard you, but to guard what sometimes comes down those roads.
sourceLines.raw: [u2174 | 02:43:28.660-02:43:35.439 | DM] they're not… Here to guard you, but to guard what sometimes comes down those roads.

sourceLines.text: They're the… Ones who keep those roads safe.
sourceLines.raw: [u2175 | 02:43:37.450-02:43:41.590 | DM] They're the… Ones who keep those roads safe.

sourceLines.text: We keep the travelers safe, as they go from house to house, like me.
sourceLines.raw: [u2176 | 02:43:41.830-02:43:46.129 | DM] We keep the travelers safe, as they go from house to house, like me.
